role: A region-level React view for the 'grow' workflow that lets an operator teach a new node, review/approve/reject the brain's surfaced proposal, inspect live node-types, and revert the last self-change.
capabilities: Teach-new-node name/spec inputs and dispatch-build button
Surfaced proposal card with COA plain-language draft and drill-to-raw-code toggle
Operator rejection of proposal with captured reason
Live node-types registry displayed as kind-toned chips
Last self-change audit footer with bounded git-revert affordance
substance_why: The file implements a complete, wired region with multiple interactive surfaces, input handling, API calls for reject, and data-ui-refs throughout.
interactions_present: Typing node name and spec updates state
Toggling drill mode shows/hides raw code
Typing a rejection reason updates state
Clicking reject calls api.resolve, clears surface, sets message, and polls
Clicking revert last self-change triggers revertLast()
interactions_missing: No loading/pending feedback during dispatch, approval, reject, or revert
No input validation or disabled-state before dispatch
No error handling for approveApply or revertLast failures
Node-type chips are not actually navigable despite the navigable claim
No persistent history/trajectory view of past proposals
performance_risks: Anonymous onClick/onChange handlers recreated every render
Synchronous poll() after reject may trigger immediate re-render cascade
No memoization of surfaces or chip lists
reuse_why: The region's responsibilities and data hooks are correct and should be preserved, but its markup should be rebuilt/refined using the shared kit and split into smaller presentational pieces.
decomposition_hints: Extract teach-new-node form into its own component
Extract surfaced-for-approval Surface into its own component
Extract live node-types lane into its own component
Extract last-self-change audit footer into its own component
Separate pure presentation from useApp() data/container logic
